---
layout: cv
title: Tyler Wright's Resume
---

# Tyler Wright
Computer Science Senior | Machine Learning & Automation

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:tylerwright200012@gmail.com">tylerwright200012@gmail.com</a>
| (916) 247-1251
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tyler-wright-9a8344b9/">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

---

## Summary
Computer Science senior at BYU-Idaho with hands-on experience building real-world automation systems and applying machine learning techniques. Strong background in Python and data processing, with a focus on practical problem-solving, system design, and improving business workflows.

---

## Education

`2023 – Present`  
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__, Rexburg, ID  
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science  

`2018 – 2022`  
__Los Medanos College__, Pittsburg, CA  
Associate of Science in Electrical Technology (ETEC)

---

## Projects

### Automated Purchase Order Document Routing System (Senior Project)
- Designed and implemented an end-to-end system to automate processing of scanned purchase order PDFs using OCR and rule-based extraction  
- Built a multi-stage pipeline (PDF → image → OCR → extraction → classification → routing) to reduce manual document sorting  
- Developed spatial and text-based methods to identify purchase order numbers with heuristic confidence scoring  
- Integrated Google Drive API to automatically route documents into structured folders based on classification  
- Implemented logging and batch processing with run-level summaries for monitoring and reliability  
- Designed system to safely route ambiguous or unsupported documents to manual review  

### Machine Learning Model Development & Evaluation
- Built and evaluated multiple machine learning models including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and Gradient Boosted models  
- Applied model evaluation techniques using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrices  
- Compared model performance across different approaches and datasets to understand strengths and limitations  
- Gained experience in feature selection, preprocessing, and avoiding common pitfalls such as data leakage  

### Tetris Clone (Individual Project)
- Built a fully functional Tetris game in Rust without prior experience  
- Applied object-oriented design principles with modular components  
- Developed clean, maintainable code with custom game logic  

---

## Work Experience

`Pocatello, ID`  
__Family Auto Care__  
- Assisted in improving shop workflows through technical solutions and process optimization  
- Supported development and testing of internal tools for document handling and organization  
- Collaborated with team members to integrate new systems into daily operations  

`Pittsburg, CA`  
__Deli Employee__, TOGO's  
- Worked collaboratively in a fast-paced environment  
- Managed customer orders, restocking, and daily operations efficiently  

---

## Technical Skills

**Languages:** Python, JavaScript, C++, Java, Rust, Erlang, C#  
**Technologies:** OCR (Tesseract), Machine Learning, Data Processing  
**Tools:** Git, VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA  

---

## Volunteer Experience

`2020 – 2022`  
__Missionary__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Las Vegas, NV  
- Studied and communicated in Japanese daily  
- Conducted planning sessions and submitted weekly reports  
- Developed strong communication, discipline, and leadership skills
